guardrails.title: Migration Required for Schema Changes
guardrails.body: Changes involving database schema modifications shall include a migration plan in the spec.

guardrails.title: No Raw SQL Without Parameterization
guardrails.body: When writing raw SQL, parameter bindings shall be used. Building SQL via string concatenation is prohibited.

guardrails.title: Destructive DDL Requires Safeguard
guardrails.body: Destructive DDL (DROP, TRUNCATE, etc.) shall include safeguards such as backup verification or staged execution in the spec.

guardrails.title: Verify Connection Target
guardrails.body: A mechanism shall be in place to verify that the database connection target matches the intended environment (production, staging, development) before execution.

guardrails.title: Specify Target Database Version
guardrails.body: The target database version shall be stated in the spec. When using features that differ across versions, compatibility shall be verified.
